PURPOSE: List of key Wheel of Destiny builds per vocation (up to 1000~ wheel points).
Make adjustments based on your specific needs, spawn, gems and exact number of points.

To ask for further advice or make wheel suggestions - join our Discord.


Best Lesser Gems:
  • Mitigation
  • Hit Points
  • Any Elemental Resistance
  • Mana
Best Greater Gems:
  • Twin Bursts Mastery
  • Blessing of the Grove Mastery
  • Strong Ice Wave Base Damage
Points Description Notes
0 Druid wheels to be confirmed in some days, fork wheel position seems bugged atm
Best Lesser Gems:
  • Mitigation
  • Hit Points
  • Any Elemental Resistance
Best Greater Gems:
  • Fierce Berserk Base Damage
  • Front Sweep Base Damage
  • Fair Wound Cleansing
  • Combat Mastery Mastery
  • Executioner's Throw Mastery
Points Description
50 T1 Front Sweep
100 T1 Front Sweep + 1x Gem
150 T1 Front Sweep + 2x Gem
225 T1 Front Sweep + 3x Gem
250 T1 Combat Mastery + T1 Front Sweep
500 T1 Combat Mastery + T1 Executioner's Throw + T1 Front Sweep
500 T2 Combat Mastery + 1x Greater Gem
500 T2 Executioner's Throw + 1x Greater Gem
600 T2 Combat Mastery + 1x Greater Gem + T1 Intense Wound Cleansing
750 T2 Executioner's Throw + T1 Combat Mastery + 1x Greater Gem
925 T2 Executioner's Throw + T2 Exori Min + T1 Combat Mastery + 1x Greater Gem
1000 T2 Combat Mastery + T2 Executioner's Throw + 2x Greater Gem

  • Mitigation
  • Hit Points
  • Any Elemental Resistance
Best Greater Gems:
  • Divine Caldera Base Damage
  • Divine Empowerment Mastery
  • Salvation Healing

  • Mitigation

  • Any Elemental Resistance
  • Mana
Best Greater Gems:
  • Beam Mastery Mastery
  • Great Energy Beam Base Damage
  • Great Fire Wave Base Damage
  • UE Base Damage
